production_assistant.technical_quality_notes: Audio is clear despite the narrator fighting a cold. Pacing is deliberate and fits the 'Grandpa' persona well, though some long pauses during character creation could be tightened.

refinements.correction: The Golden Ones have claimed this hall
The Old Man's Wind is fading

strategic_analyst.safety_protocol_notes: Excellent early gathering of flint and wood. Narrator correctly identified the danger of the night and prioritized a fire and enclosed shelter to secure a spawn point.
highlight_gold: 09:21 - Detailed explanation of the food fork color system
14:41 - Clear guidance on tree hardness and progression
28:51 - Explanation of the Rested Buff benefits
strategic_analyst.strategic_growth_goal: Transition from 'game' terminology (seeds/biomes) to 'saga' terminology (roots/realms) to deepen immersion while maintaining the helpful guidance.
